owner.name: Rob Chambers
owner.tagline: A guide to working with me

sections.title: Working Hours & Days
items: Monday–Thursday

sections.title: Communication Preferences
items: Async first — Slack over calls for non-urgent topics
A short doc beats a long thread for complex discussions
Lets chat when we need to!

sections.title: Conditions I Like to Work In
items: Like working with a good degree of uncertasinty and solving problems
Let me know what you need and let me get on with it

sections.title: Things I Need
items: Decent tech and freedom on it to work
Freedom to ask questions

sections.title: Best Way to Receive Feedback
items: Direct and specific is better than vague and gentle
Written feedback I can reflect on works better than verbal-only
I appreciate feedback as close to the event as possible

sections.title: Things I Love at Work
items: Solving gnarly technical problems with a small team
Sharing knowledge

sections.title: Things I Struggle With
items: Dont ask me to take notes
Boredom

sections.title: What Gets Me Excited Outside of Work
items: Sport, watching Pompey of the Chicago Bears
Getting out and about
Love a Cognac

sections.title: Top 5 Films
items: V for Vendetta
Hot Fuzz
Princess Mononoke
Scott Pilgrim
Errrr

sections.title: Favourite Cheese
items: Manchego
But chedder as well of course, more mature the better

sections.title: Any Other Interesting Fact
items: I can juggle a football pretty much indefinitely
I used to powerlift and could squat 140+ kg
Can take apart a pocket watch and put it back together

sections.title: Favourite Joke
items: Why do programmers prefer dark mode?
Because light attracts bugs.
